name: Ariadna Mikeshina
abstract: Ariadna Mikeshina (Russian: Ариадна Михайловна Микешина; October 17, 1900 – May 18, 1982), earlier known as Ariadna Roumanova, was a Russian-born pianist and composer.

concerts.label: Concert-Lecture in Russian by Ariadna Mikeshina

about_quotes.speaker: David Spinozza
about_quotes.evidence: I took orchestration lessons with a lady named Ariadna Mikeshina... I studied with her for six years
about_quotes.doc_title: David Spinozza interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, NY, September 27, 2025
